headline: Why First Solar (FSLR) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of solar panel manufacturer First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) jumped 6.1% in the afternoon session after the company announced a partnership with GameChange Solar to support the deployment of its domestically manufactured thin-film solar modules in India.

raw.headline: Why First Solar (FSLR) Stock Is Trading Up Today

headline: Why First Solar (FSLR) Is Up 7.5% After New India Tracker Partnership With GameChange
summary: In May 2026, GameChange Solar announced a new partnership with First Solar to expand the use of First Solar’s domestically manufactured thin‑film modules on GameChange’s Genius Tracker systems in India, following over a year of high‑uptime utility‑scale project performance. This collaboration aligns First Solar’s Indian manufacturing footprint with evolving ALMM and ALCM regulations, potentially reducing compliance uncertainty and supply chain risk for developers using its Series 7 and other...
